textByHash.0fea8acaa6c74a5ab802d6f718f201507620821d: You? Attempting the Gauntlet? If you say so!
textByHash.1152cc76efd761381640a05c2fdbde143de6954f: Don't think you want to be heading down there without knowing what you're getting into! Come and see me, if you really want to go down there.
textByHash.1803edb168cc14edbc7c48ab6ea4cba1e6e7d656: There's something in that there chest waiting for you. Don't leave it for too long.
textByHash.2883917518898327fffbb3780931381b8399c617: Alright... Well be careful down here. I've got my eye on you.
textByHash.2e64f74bb8760bde1a222118adc7ad58591aeec4: Don't think you can be taking any plus ones down there with you.
textByHash.4b87cb5d1e72aa773585c547b0e1538bf3577f9c: I think that covers it... Everything else, you'll have to work out for yourself while you're in there.
textByHash.54e78409d37cd3531041e1fdf864252ecdb70345: You can always come back and ask me to go over things again.
textByHash.62450fff759f782db7f4b1a7350be9f23bd12502: What are you doing down here?
textByHash.67b6e398defde88dd7ce7726edad25c0fbc63ec3: This here is the Gauntlet, the finest creation of the Amlodd clan. It was built years ago to help train Prifddinas' finest warriors and survivalists.
textByHash.6e4dac886f40f713759cf2d321be1b8ae1f89740: That's right. Once you feel you're ready, or once we decide that you've spent long enough down there, you'll have to face the fearsome Crystalline Hunllef.
textByHash.7589033543b9e7ae53a41a0f5fbd0c5ec29a1499: Without any armour, those crystalline creatures can be real nasty. Any armour that you make down there will greatly reduce the damage they do to you.
textByHash.82d36853f38f7d8c55e884fcad53dab961255158: That's right. The Gauntlet contains a range of deadly creatures formed from crystal. Defeating them is the key to victory, but it is no easy task.
textByHash.94142fa066daed15ff4ed40372c69087f805036f: Once you go down there, there are only two ways out... You can make a break for the exit, or if you're bested in combat we'll send someone in for you.
textByHash.a7177c4040e799123685bdd202b09d1a360388ee: Resources can be gathered throughout the dungeon. These can be used to create the weapons, armour, food and potions needed to survive.
textByHash.a7df51d879a14e3171db4efbfc51cdb8cd82652d: You know, if things start getting comfortable down there, things can be a little unstable at times.
textByHash.b4970ec13c1daf2e9e26a0d62cd2e6f570e6388d: This is because all participants start with nothing at hand beyond a few basic tools.
textByHash.b4e0d6fa50ff7964543473b3cd3590e97b9a2741: It might be a little frightening, but it makes for a good challenge!
textByHash.c224399a1ceffee836aebdab47c8e2f462466e23: Things can be a little unstable down there at times, too... Everything gets corrupted, and it might be a little frightening, but it makes for a good challenge.
textByHash.e3ad9e469ed24cb6626cb2703c1853df40f67436: Hey! Finish your fight before you come in here!
